title: Fix up Tutorial 3 to account for format
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Update Tutorial 3 to add `--format=docker` to a number of the examples where it was missing.  Add a note about the BUILDAH_FORMAT environment variable.
